children.heading: Authorizations for five calendar quarters beginningJuly 1, 1977
children.label: a Authorizations for five calendar quarters beginningJuly 1, 1977
children.text: There is hereby authorized to be appropriated for each of the five succeeding calendar quarters (beginning with the calendar quarter which begins on ) for the purpose of making payments under this subchapter to Puerto Rico, Guam, American Samoa, and the Virgin Islands, an amount equal to 1 percent of the amount authorized for each such quarter under .July 1, 1977section 6722(b) of this title

The Secretary shall allocate from the amount authorized under subsection (a) an amount for the purpose of making payments to such governments equal to the total authorized for the calendar quarter multiplied by the applicable territorial percentage.

For the purposes of this subsection, the applicable territorial percentage is equal to the quotient resulting from the division of the territorial population by the sum of the territorial population for all territories.

children.label: A
children.text: The term “territory” means Puerto Rico, Guam, American Samoa, and the Virgin Islands.

children.label: B
children.text: The term “territorial population” means the most recent population for each territory as determined by the Bureau of Census.

children.label: C
children.text: The provisions of sections 6723(c)(4), 6724, 6725, 6726, 6727, 6728, 6729, 6730, 6731, 6732, and 6733 of this title shall apply to the funds authorized under this section.11See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Payments to local governments
children.label: c Payments to local governments
children.text: The governments of the territories are authorized to make payments to local governments within their jurisdiction from sums received under this section as they deem appropriate.
